description_long: This is a round, woven picnic basket filled with several golden-brown loaves of bread. The basket is constructed from thick, braided fibers, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance, and features two looped handles on opposite sides for easy carrying. The weave pattern is tight and consistent, with a slightly rough texture and a natural, earthy coloration. The bread inside is arranged so that it overflows slightly above the rim, with visible crusts and a dusting of flour. The handles are integrated into the rim, made from the same braided material as the basket body. There is no visible lid or closure mechanism, and the basket's interior is open and accessible.
description: A round, tightly woven picnic basket with braided handles, filled with golden loaves of bread and no visible lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basket's woven texture, both handles, and a clear display of the bread loaves inside.
description_view_1: Side view with the left handle more visible and the bread loaves slightly angled, revealing more of their crusts.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the basket's weave and the bread loaves stacked towards the back, with the right handle more prominent.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the right handle and a dense arrangement of bread loaves, with the basket's rim and weave clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, looped handles made of braided wicker, attached to the rim on opposite sides.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with thick, braided fibers forming a consistent, rustic pattern.
